group.description: Report concepts for visualizing OSGi bundle dependencies and per-bundle AsciiDoc fragments.

concept.description: Returns bundle dependency adjacency pairs (source, target) with dependency types, versions, and type dependency count.
concept.cypher: MATCH (source:Osgi:Bundle)-[d:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT source.bundleSymbolicName AS Source, source.bundleVersion AS SourceVersion, target.bundleSymbolicName AS Target, target.bundleVersion AS TargetVersion, d.viaRequireBundle AS ViaRequireBundle, d.viaPackageWiring AS ViaPackageWiring, d.typeDependencyCount AS TypeDependencyCount ORDER BY Source, SourceVersion, Target, TargetVersion

concept.description: Returns runtime bundle dependency adjacency pairs, excluding pure Java IMPLEMENTS relationships. Same shape as osgi:BundleDependencyGraph but based on DEPENDS_ON_RUNTIME edges.
concept.cypher: MATCH (source:Osgi:Bundle)-[d:DEPENDS_ON_RUNTIME]->(target:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT source.bundleSymbolicName AS Source, source.bundleVersion AS SourceVersion, target.bundleSymbolicName AS Target, target.bundleVersion AS TargetVersion, d.viaRequireBundle AS ViaRequireBundle, d.viaPackageWiring AS ViaPackageWiring, d.typeDependencyCount AS TypeDependencyCount ORDER BY Source, SourceVersion, Target, TargetVersion

concept.description: Bundle metadata (Symbolic Name, Version, Name, Vendor, Activator) rendered to AsciiDoc via the templates/osgi-BundleMetadataReport.adoc.ftl template.
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN b.bundleSymbolicName AS SymbolicName, b.bundleVersion AS Version, b.bundleName AS Name, b.bundleVendor AS Vendor, b.bundleActivator AS Activator ORDER BY SymbolicName

concept.description: All Main-section MANIFEST.MF headers per bundle, rendered as a key/value AsciiDoc table.
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(e:ManifestEntry) RETURN DISTINCT b.bundleSymbolicName AS SymbolicName, e.name AS HeaderName, e.value AS HeaderValue ORDER BY SymbolicName, HeaderName

concept.description: Require-Bundle entries per bundle with target version range, optional flag and resolution status.
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(rb:Osgi:RequiredBundle) OPTIONAL MATCH (rb)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(target:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT b.bundleSymbolicName AS SymbolicName, rb.symbolicName AS RequiredBundle, coalesce(rb.versionRange, '') AS VersionRange, coalesce(rb.optional, false) AS Optional, target IS NOT NULL AS Resolved ORDER BY SymbolicName, RequiredBundle

concept.description: Import-Package entries per bundle with version, optional flag, and whether some bundle exports a matching package.
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle)-[:IMPORTS_PACKAGE]->(ip:Osgi:ImportedPackage) OPTIONAL MATCH (ep:Osgi:ExportedPackage)-[:SATISFIES]->(ip) WITH b.bundleSymbolicName AS SymbolicName, ip, count(ep) > 0 AS Resolved RETURN DISTINCT SymbolicName, ip.fqn AS Package, coalesce(ip.version, '') AS Version, coalesce(ip.optional, false) AS Optional, Resolved ORDER BY SymbolicName, Package

MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle)-[:EXPORTS_PACKAGE]->(ep:Osgi:ExportedPackage) RETURN DISTINCT b.bundleSymbolicName AS SymbolicName, ep.fqn AS Package, coalesce(ep.version, '') AS Version ORDER BY SymbolicName, Package

concept.description: Top-level Java classes contained in the bundle (excluding inner and anonymous classes).
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS*1..3]->(c) WHERE c:Class AND c:Java AND NOT c.fqn CONTAINS '$' RETURN DISTINCT b.bundleSymbolicName AS SymbolicName, c.fqn AS ClassName ORDER BY SymbolicName, ClassName

concept.description: Java enum types contained in the bundle.
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS*1..3]->(e) WHERE e:Enum AND e:Java RETURN DISTINCT b.bundleSymbolicName AS SymbolicName, e.fqn AS EnumName ORDER BY SymbolicName, EnumName

concept.description: Configuration files (.properties) shipped inside the bundle.
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS*1..5]->(p:Properties:File) RETURN DISTINCT b.bundleSymbolicName AS SymbolicName, p.fileName AS FilePath ORDER BY SymbolicName, FilePath

concept.description: Java packages contained in the bundle as a flat list (used as a basis for source-structure documentation).
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS*1..5]->(p:Java:Package) WHERE p.fqn IS NOT NULL AND p.fqn <> '' RETURN DISTINCT b.bundleSymbolicName AS SymbolicName, p.fqn AS Package ORDER BY SymbolicName, Package

concept.description: Returns Require-Bundle adjacency pairs (source, required) with version ranges. Includes both resolved and unresolved entries.
concept.cypher: MATCH (source:Osgi:Bundle)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(rb:Osgi:RequiredBundle) OPTIONAL MATCH (rb)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(target:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT source.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, source.bundleVersion AS BundleVersion, rb.symbolicName AS RequiredBundle, rb.versionRange AS VersionRange, rb.optional AS Optional, target.bundleSymbolicName IS NOT NULL AS Resolved ORDER BY Bundle, BundleVersion, RequiredBundle
